curation_notes: Patch commit is the merge of PR #105 into master. The diff modifies 2 non-test source files: lib/nodejs/worker.ex (Elixir GenServer worker) and priv/server.js (Node.js child process). The vulnerability is a classic race condition: the worker protocol had no request-response correlation, so a timed-out response could be picked up by the next caller's receive block. The fix adds a monotonic UID counter per worker, includes the UID in the request payload sent to Node.js, and matches the echoed UID in the response. Pre-assigned class race-condition is correct — CWE-362 maps directly to the lack of synchronization in the message-passing protocol. No sibling files share this vulnerability pattern; error.ex and supervisor.ex serve different roles.
